ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Timepoint/visit label
Notes: e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? If I show that I am feeling worried, irritable, nervous, or afraid... The medical team will notice and treat me differently.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? If I show that I am feeling worried, irritable, nervous, or afraid... The team will think I am difficult.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? If I show that I am feeling worried, irritable, nervous, or afraid... My doctors won't believe me if I say I have pain.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? If I show that I am feeling worried, irritable, nervous, or afraid... My doctors will give me medications that will negatively affect my birth experience.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? If I show that I am feeling worried, irritable, nervous, or afraid... My family will be embarrassed.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? If I show that I am feeling worried, irritable, nervous, or afraid... My support person will worry.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I am concerned that if I feel worried, overwhelmed, or panicked... I will not enjoy my birth experience.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I am concerned that if I feel worried, overwhelmed, or panicked... I will be letting my baby down.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I am concerned that if I feel worried, overwhelmed, or panicked... I will not to be mentally or emotionally present for the delivery.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I am concerned that if I feel worried, overwhelmed, or panicked... I may not be able to ask for what I need.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I am concerned that if I feel worried, overwhelmed, or panicked... I will forget or be unable to use my normal coping strategies.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I am concerned that if I feel worried, overwhelmed, or panicked... I will have a hard time bonding with my baby.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I am concerned that if I feel worried, overwhelmed, or panicked... I will disappoint myself.
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I will become more afraid if I notice my body responding to worry in the following ways... Heart racing?
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I will become more afraid if I notice my body responding to worry in the following ways... Chest tightening?
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

ElementDescription: In the days leading up to your delivery, how true are the following statements for you? I will become more afraid if I notice my body responding to worry in the following ways... Nausea or dizziness?
Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much

Notes: 1= Very little; 2= A little; 3= Some; 4= Much; 5= Very much
